commit_message: Decider: EXP-211 integrated (Phase A2 complete) + Phase B queue pushes
error: Permission to funwithscience-org/dome-model-review.git denied to Devilwench (403). GitHub API confirms PAT valid but 'Resource not accessible by personal access token' on write ops. Fine-grained PAT may lack contents:write scope.
recovery_options: 1. Update PAT in scheduled task prompts with a new fine-grained PAT that has contents:write for dome-model-review repo.
2. Clone repo, copy updated files from the FUSE workspace (all 12 files above), commit with SHA 5097a15 changes, push.
3. Or pull origin on the FUSE workspace files and commit manually.
